problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: The key to What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? is Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity — specifically Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
